label: 节庆红金版
texture_guidance: 亮朱红纸、米白留白、暖金灯笼光、轻微纸雕层次、节庆餐桌烟火气。
scene_prompt: FESTIVE RED COMMERCIAL POSTER. light: warm lantern light from top and side, soft golden glow behind the title, food remains bright and appetizing, no harsh nightclub neon. material: 亮朱红 textured paper, ivory paper-cut negative space, subtle gold foil edge, lantern silk, ceramic tableware, festive steam, controlled paper-cut shapes. color: 亮朱红 #E5282E, tomato red #F04438, warm gold #D8A441, ivory #FFF1D6; ivory and bright warm highlights must balance the red field, gold stays under 18% to avoid cheap shine. composition: ceremonial frame around edges occupying 10-14% border area; title centered in upper 32%; food or gathering table in lower 45%; keep middle clear for hierarchy and avoid a full dark-red flood. avoid: no western Christmas icon unless requested, no random fireworks clutter, no fake official festival logos, no excessive gold 3D text, no muddy dark red background.
design_lessons: 中式节庆要靠层级和材质控制喜庆感，避免整张图被红金填满。
